CustomField.description: This formula helps you identify whether the seller's HUD-1 information is filled in correctly. This formula indicates whether Total Reductions to Amount Due to Seller equals Gross Amount Due minus Net Cash to Seller.
CustomField.formula:
IF(ISBLANK(TEXT(HOMEtracker__Resale_Type__c)), "Unknown. Enter Resale Type to use Seller Reductions Accounted For.",
IF(OR(BEGINS(TEXT(HOMEtracker__Resale_Type__c), "Foreclosure" ),BEGINS(TEXT(HOMEtracker__Resale_Type__c) , "Deed In Lieu" )), "Not applicable. Because this is a " & TEXT(HOMEtracker__Resale_Type__c) & " type of resale you will not have a settlement statement to reconcile.",
IF(ISBLANK(HOMEtracker__Net_Cash_to_Seller_at_Closing__c), "Unknown. Enter Net Cash to Seller and Gross Amount Due to Seller.", IF(ISBLANK(HOMEtracker__Gross_Amount_Due_to_Seller__c),"Unknown. Enter Net Cash to Seller and Gross Amount Due to Seller.",
IF(((HOMEtracker__Gross_Amount_Due_to_Seller__c - IF(ISBLANK(HOMEtracker__Total_Reductions_to_Amount_Due_Seller__c), 0, HOMEtracker__Total_Reductions_to_Amount_Due_Seller__c)) == HOMEtracker__Net_Cash_to_Seller_at_Closing__c ), "Yes", "No. Your numbers are off by $" & TEXT(ABS(HOMEtracker__Gross_Amount_Due_to_Seller__c - IF(ISBLANK(HOMEtracker__Total_Reductions_to_Amount_Due_Seller__c), 0, HOMEtracker__Total_Reductions_to_Amount_Due_Seller__c) - HOMEtracker__Net_Cash_to_Seller_at_Closing__c)) & ". Check the input fields to Total Reductions to Amount Due Seller. Total Reductions to Amount Due Seller (" & IF(ISBLANK(HOMEtracker__Total_Reductions_to_Amount_Due_Seller__c), "blank", "$" & TEXT(HOMEtracker__Total_Reductions_to_Amount_Due_Seller__c)) & ") should equal Gross Amount Due to Seller ($" & TEXT(HOMEtracker__Gross_Amount_Due_to_Seller__c) & ") minus Net Cash to Seller at Closing ($" & TEXT(HOMEtracker__Net_Cash_to_Seller_at_Closing__c) & ").")))))
CustomField.inlineHelpText: This formula helps you identify whether the seller's HUD-1 information is filled in correctly. This formula indicates whether Total Reductions to Amount Due to Seller equals Gross Amount Due minus Net Cash to Seller.
CustomField.label: Seller Reductions Accounted For?
